titleStmt.title: SII 36.126: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 126. (A.R. No. 126 of 1910.) TEṈKARAI, NILAKKOTTAI TALUK, MADURA DISTRICT. On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Mūlasthānēśvara temple.

summary.p: (Kaṉṉi, śu, 7, Sunday, Mūlam = A.D. 1284, September 17, Sunday.)

Incomplete and damaged. Seems to refer to a tax free grant of land for performing some services. Records an undertaking given by the servants, accountants and treasurers of Mūlasthāṉamuḍaiya Nāyaṉār temple in Teṉ Kallaga-nāḍu to the Veṇkaṇaṅkuḍaiyāṉ Ātkoṇḍān Umai-orupākar of the lineage of Paṇḍaraṅgavāṇar, the chief of Mēlai Tiruñānasampandaṉ Tirumaṭam, situated near the western gate of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiruvāykkeḻvikku mel śrī komārapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ ko
ṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 vatu kaṉṉi nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptatamiyum nāyaṟṟuk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
mūlattu nāḷ teṉkallaka nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār śrī mūlasthāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyilil tevakaṉmi kaṇakka paṇṭā
rikaḷom melait tiruvācalil melait tiruñāṉacampantaṉ tirumaṭattu mutaliyār paṇṭaraṅkavāṇar ca
ntāṉattu Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam kulacekarapurattu veṇkaṇaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉ Umaiorupā
kaṟkku kalveṭṭik koḷḷa piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉārkku tirucceṅkaḻunīr tiruvoṭai ce
kīḻiraiyum paṇṭoṭu paḻanaṭai ceṉṉi ttom tiraiyaṉ Iṟai
ḷḷa kaṟpūravilai tāṉiya mukkala
yaka ṉum perāl tiruvo Innā
pāṟ kellai nilamāvatu coḻakulāntakap piccan vaḷamāna
kāṉa patina nā ṟuppatiṉālil kiḻakkaṭaiyavum patiṉaiñcil teṟkaṭaiyavum
Digital edition of SII 36.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
